headline: McEwen Boosts Financial Strength With San Jose Dividend Payout
summary: MUX receives a $49.4M San Jose Mine dividend, lifting 2026 payouts above expectations and supporting expansion and balance-sheet goals.

headline: BASF and Cromology Turn Waste Tires Into Sustainable Wall Paint
summary: BASFY partners with Cromology to launch wall paint made from recycled tires, bringing circular economy innovation to decorative coatings.

headline: 4 Diversified Chemical Stocks to Gain From Demand Rebound
summary: The Zacks Chemicals Diversified industry is expected to benefit from an uptick in demand across major end-use markets and the end of destocking activities. APD, DOW, ALB and MEOH are set to gain from strategic actions and demand recovery.

raw.headline: 4 Diversified Chemical Stocks to Gain From Demand Rebound

headline: Here Are Tuesday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Albemarle, Booz Allen Hamilton, Cigna, DT Midstream, GE Vernova, Intel, Okta, Travelers, Occidental Petroleum, and More
summary: Pre-Market Stock Futures: Futures are trading higher as investors return to a holiday-shortened trading week after a record-setting Friday, when the S&P 500, which posted its eighth straight weekly gain, and the Dow Jones Industrial Average both posted new all-time highs, closing at 7,473 and 50,579, respectively. headline: RBC Capital Maintains Outperform on Albemarle, Raises Price Target to $257
summary: RBC Capital  analyst Arun Viswanathan   maintains Albemarle (NYSE:ALB) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $253 to $257.
